title: Withdraw ₳2,162,096 for Midgard - Optimistic Rollups administered by Intersect

rationale.summary: Vote: ABSTAIN. For this TreasuryWithdrawals (enacted), evidence quality was insufficient for a reliable YES or NO decision. Decisive reason: a treasury action without a complete deep-research dossier cannot be voted directionally without pretending certainty. Weighed against it: the proposal substantiates "This treasury withdrawal funds Midgard - Optimistic Rollups which will provide the following services: Midgard, which is a modular framework for deploying optimistic rollup Layer 2s on the Cardano blockchain, designed to enhance transaction throughput, redu..." though 8 review blocker(s) remain open.
